title: v2 api: top improvements
body:
* Use `pkg/adapter` to increase code reuse and reduce code redundancy.
* Extend swagger docs to mention AIX descriptors.
* Document the libpod endpoint which shares the same handler.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@baude @jwhonce PTAL

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

While testing I found a small bug in the top-backend. In some cases, we fall back to exec-ing ps(1) in the container. Via the v2 api, I've seen conmon debug messages in the returned data. That was because the top-backend was using one pipe for stderr and stdout. I assume we never caught that because we don't run `top` in debug-mode. Anyhow, it's fixed now.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #4872) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
